consumer_hint: Node v175 release handoff readiness review
scope: restore handoff checklist fixture for manual pre-restore review and CHECKJSON risk confirmation

handoff_target.boundary: restore handoff checklist is manual review evidence only and does not execute restore

required_confirmations: artifact digest target recorded outside mini-kv
snapshot review placeholder recorded outside mini-kv
WAL review placeholder recorded outside mini-kv
handoff_checklist.placeholder_policy: operator records review values outside mini-kv; fixture keeps placeholders only

expected: CHECKJSON LOAD reports store_replace_from_snapshot without executing LOAD
CHECKJSON COMPACT reports wal_rewrite_when_enabled without executing COMPACT
CHECKJSON SETNXEX reports write risks without token claim

boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
mini-kv remains not Java order authority

warnings: Node v175 may consume this fixture only after Java v62 and mini-kv v71 are complete
handoff checklist is not a restore executor
artifact, snapshot, and WAL placeholders must be verified outside mini-kv before release handoff review
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
restore operator or artifact digest target is unclear
